name: engagement-bar-01
title: Engagement Bar 01
author: ilinxa
description: Discriminated-union action row (like / comment / share / bookmark / view-count / custom) with realtime subscribe contract, sibling RSC heart-burst sub-export (CSS-keyframe driven via registry:file), per-action controlled vs uncontrolled mode, slot-based likers preview, and three variants (default / compact / stacked). No framer-motion. Highest-leverage primitive in the social-posts-system arc; retrofits cleanly into news-card-01 + event-card-01 actions slots. Fourth ship in the social-posts-system arc.
